name: ffmpeg-mcp
description: Download files and run local shell commands (ffmpeg, ffprobe, etc). Agent writes the command; this just executes it.
long_description: Minimal MCP server with two tools: `download` (URL → local path) and `shell_run` (any shell command). Built for composing video ads with local ffmpeg, but works for any local command-execution use case. SECURITY: shell_run executes arbitrary shell commands as your user. Only install if you trust the agent driving it.

workdir.title: Working directory
workdir.description: Default folder for downloaded files + ffmpeg output. Relative paths in tool calls resolve here. Example: ~/AINIO/ads

tools.name: download
tools.description: Download a URL to local disk.
